candidates.candidate_rule: A parser failure must not be converted to an empty valid model when downstream editing or saving can overwrite the original document. Preserve the last valid state or expose an explicit invalid state.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major finding on the immutable model-free battle target.

candidates.candidate_rule: A text-change handler must not synchronously reload expensive project context or catalogues on every keystroke; cache, invalidate on source changes, or debounce the render path.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major performance finding on the immutable model-free battle target.
missing_gates: measured or structurally proven expensive source-to-handler path
clean controls for cheap per-keystroke rendering

candidates.candidate_rule: A frozen evidence workflow must compare its actual base and head SHAs with the approved immutable values before diffing, scoring, or certifying target bytes.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major integrity finding; the workflow recorded event SHAs but did not enforce them.

candidates.candidate_rule: A council proof cannot pass from model-presence alone. It must require a successful review exit, complete council, zero provider errors, and zero unresolved final gaps.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major finding on the final validation block.
missing_gates: negative controls for incomplete and errored runs

candidates.candidate_rule: Validate a nullable reading before passing it to rate tracking, persistence, notification, or any other downstream side effect.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major stability finding: downstream calls occurred before the null guard.

candidates.candidate_rule: A duplicate-state comparison and state update must execute as one atomic operation; synchronizing only the setter does not protect the preceding read/check.
candidates.evidence: CodeRabbit major concurrency finding on a check-then-synchronized-write sequence.

candidates.candidate_rule: Critical mobile controls must be visible, non-overlapping, reachable, and behaviorally exercised at the target viewport; source presence and desktop rendering are insufficient proof.
candidates.evidence: 390x844 proof covered the notification bell, search/profile overlap, duplicate headers, sidebar opening, and notification preview behavior.

rejected_or_duplicate_sources.reason: Governed cross-repository intake landed through PR 142 and is present on main.
Permanent deterministic officer formation and tests landed through later council and campaign integration.
Current Command Center, package, README, and release state are newer and preserve no unique defect lineage from these branches.
The stale release candidate must be rebuilt from current main and is not accepted training truth.
Verified CodeRabbit integrity findings were repaired, tested, and merged; the consolidated accepted lesson is recorded separately.
Trigger and learned-closure lanes preserve immutable campaign evidence; no separate product lesson remains beyond the integrated transfer modules.
The branches observe or preserve comparison/certification evidence and introduce no new transferable defect mechanism.
